jobs.title: Taxi Driver
jobs.meta_description: Job description for a taxi driver position at Sähköpalvelu Sillanpää Oy, Kokemäki. Responsibilities include driving in the city and assisting passengers.
jobs.description: This job involves operating taxis within the city of Kokemäki. You will be responsible for providing reliable transportation services to customers, maintaining your vehicle's condition, and ensuring customer satisfaction. The company offers training programs for new drivers and provides a comfortable taxi service equipped with modern communication devices. As part of our team, you will have access to various benefits such as a driver’s allowance and opportunities for career development.
experience: Knowledge of local traffic rules and regulations
job_responsibilities: Provide reliable taxi services within the city of Kokemäki
Ensure vehicle maintenance and safety
Communicate with customers via phone or in person
Assist passengers with their luggage and provide directions
Adhere to company policies and procedures
what_we_offer: Driver's allowance for daily use of the taxi service
Opportunities for career development within the company
Opportunity to join special groups for driver training
Company culture that values hard work and dedication
who_is_this_for: Passionate individuals who enjoy interacting with customers

jobs.title: Signaalidata-analyst
jobs.meta_description: Data analyst position at Saranen Consulting Oy, focusing on signal and data analysis for process projects.
jobs.description: APL Systems is seeking a data analyst with development experience to grow into a full-time role in the field of operational data. The ideal candidate will join Future Skills Academy's team, which is designed for unemployed job seekers and those leaving unemployment. This position involves analyzing various data sets, interpreting signal and process data, and creating Excel-based analyses and tools. You'll produce clear reports and visualizations while collaborating with experienced analysts. We expect candidates to be passionate about data analysis and eager to learn new skills. Basic understanding of data or signal processing is required, along with experience in a technical field such as signal processing. During the training program, you will develop your knowledge in signal processing, data analytics, and Excel-based tools, and learn how to present findings clearly both internally and externally.
experience: Technical background in signal processing or related fields
what_we_expect: Basic understanding of data or signal processing
job_responsibilities: Analyze various data sets and interpret signal and process data
Create Excel-based analyses and tools
Develop clear reports and visualizations
what_we_offer: Projects that allow you to grow into a full-time analyst role
jobs.search_keywords: data analyst, signal processing, Excel-based tools, Future Skills Academy

jobs.title: Ammattitaitoinen Kiinalainen kokki
jobs.jobapply_link: mailto:xiaoqing.lv83@gmail.com?subject=Application for the Job - Ammattilainen Kiinalainen kokki
jobs.meta_description: A detailed job description for a Finnish chef with experience in preparing traditional Chinese dishes and managing a kitchen team.
jobs.description: We are seeking an experienced Chinese chef to design and prepare meals for our customers. This role requires seasoned Chinese dishes, at least three years of experience in a Chinese restaurant, extensive knowledge of the wok cooking technique, passing a formal Chinese cook’s certification, reliable work ethic, ability to independently design menus, produce food, and serve meals. Additionally, this position requires attention to detail and physical stamina. We offer an international working environment, development opportunities, and flexible scheduling.
experience: At least three years of experience in a Chinese restaurant
Extensive knowledge of the wok cooking technique
Passing a formal Chinese cook’s certification
what_we_expect: Attention to detail and physical stamina
Ability to independently design menus, produce food, and serve meals
job_responsibilities: Design and prepare traditional Chinese dishes for customers
Manage a kitchen team
Maintain a clean, hygienic, and safe working environment
Use wok cooking equipment
Monitor the temperature of kitchen appliances
Work in teams focused on dining, construction or maintenance
who_is_this_for: Individuals with experience in Chinese cuisine and a reliable work ethic
Candidates who can independently design menus and produce food
jobs.search_keywords: Chinese chef, traditional dishes, kitchen management, wok cooking, flexible scheduling

jobs.title: Kokenut pyörämekaanikko ASAP
jobs.salary_range: Competitive salary within the industry. Additionally, we offer free coffee whenever you need it!
jobs.meta_description: Mechanical technician position at Linnet Bikes in Helsinki, providing maintenance and repair services for bicycles.
jobs.description: At our small bicycle maintenance company located in Itä-Helsinki, we specialize in repairing various types of bicycles including city bikes, touring bikes, and hybrid bikes. Our mission is to provide high-quality service and a friendly experience so that customers can rely on us! We are currently looking for part-time or full-time technicians who can work flexible hours (8-38h/week). What do we offer as part of our team? We provide a comfortable working environment, a pleasant atmosphere, and the best available equipment. For example, we use electric bike stands with large windows, and you don't need to stand at the entrance while riding. Flexible work schedules are possible within reason. We have an anonymous mechanic but it's a key part of our team. Direct customer contact is included in your daily tasks.
experience: Previous experience working on bicycle repairs is required.
Fluent Finnish language skills are essential as you will be directly interacting with customers.
Part-time or full-time availability is preferred.
what_we_expect: We expect our team members to be reliable and have previous experience with bicycle repairs.
Fluent Finnish language skills are essential as you will be directly interacting with customers.
Flexible work schedules are possible within reason.
job_responsibilities: Provide maintenance and repair services for bicycles.
Use electric bike stands with large windows.
Work flexible hours (8-38h/week).
Have direct customer contact included in your daily tasks.
what_we_offer: Free coffee whenever you need it!
who_is_this_for: Previous experience with bicycle repairs is required.
Fluent Finnish language skills are essential as you will be directly interacting with customers.
Flexible work schedules are possible within reason.
jobs.search_keywords: Mechanical technician, bicycle maintenance, Linnet Bikes, Helsinki

jobs.title: Accountant/bookkeeper
jobs.meta_description: Looking for an accountant/bookkeeper to work as a subcontractor with Easy Crew, handling small-scale client invoices from home.
jobs.description: We are seeking an experienced accountant/bookkeeper to join our team of subcontractors. The ideal candidate will have at least 1-2 years of experience in accounting and bookkeeping. They will be responsible for processing invoices, maintaining financial records, and providing support as needed. This position is remote and can be done from home.
experience: at least 1-2 years of work experience in accounting or bookkeeping
what_we_expect: ability to handle financial transactions independently
strong attention to detail and accuracy in record-keeping
job_responsibilities: processing client invoices
maintaining financial records
providing support as needed
who_is_this_for: individuals with experience in accounting and bookkeeping who are looking for a full-time remote position
jobs.search_keywords: accountant, bookkeeper, subcontractor, small-scale client invoicing, financial records
